title: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem
raw_preview:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act requires large generative artificial intelligence system providers to label AI-generated content.",
    "The act mandates the provision of an AI-detection tool for users to query whether content was created by AI.",
raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act requires large generative artificial intelligence system providers to label AI-generated content.",
    "The act mandates the provision of an AI-detection tool for users to query whether content was created by AI.",
    "Large generative AI providers are required to label images, videos, and audio created by their models.",
    "The legislation aims to advance provenance, transparency, and accountability in AI-generated content.",
    "There are concerns about the potential misuse of high-quality content generated by AI, including spreading political misinformation and creating deepfakes.",
    "CAITA addresses the growing influence of AI in product creation and ensures consumers have the information needed to make informed choices.",
    "The introduction of CAITA marks a significant step toward establishing clear guidelines for AI-generated products."
  ]
}
```
